caption: A man wearing a blue long-sleeved button-down shirt is seated at a digital piano in a studio setting with purple lighting in the background. He is positioned in front of a microphone on a stand. The video features a split-screen layout where the top portion shows the man and a musical staff, while the bottom portion shows a close-up view of the piano keys. Throughout the sequence, the man plays different chords, which are highlighted by red bars appearing over specific keys on the keyboard. On-screen text identifies the chords being played: "D Perfect 5th" appears first, followed by "D min," and then "Bb Major 3rd." As the text changes, the red markers shift to different keys, and the man's hand moves across the keyboard to press the corresponding notes. Musical notation on the staff changes in synchronization with the chords.
